title: Copy of petition and judgment to registrar
doc_html:
§70.  Copy of petition and judgment to registrar

A certified copy of the petition and judgment for a delayed certificate of birth shall be furnished to the state registrar of vital records within ten days after the judgment is rendered.  

Acts 1979, No. 776, §1.
doc_text:
§70.  Copy of petition and judgment to registrar
A certified copy of the petition and judgment for a delayed certificate of birth shall be furnished to the state registrar of vital records within ten days after the judgment is rendered.
Acts 1979, No. 776, §1.
